reviews.comment:
Muy limpia y pintoresca la Estacion.
Pero cierran los baños de noche y ni siendo cliente te dan la llave..
Solo permanece abierto el baño de Discapacitados..

(Translated by Google)
The station is very clean and picturesque.

But they close the restrooms at night, and even as a customer, they don't give you the key. Only the accessible restroom remains open.
